attributes.description: DNS Protection events from Cato Networks including MITRE mapping and threat details.

params.markdown:
**Cato Networks**

**Overview**

This dashboard covers threat detection and DNS security events from Cato Networks, including DNS Protection blocks.

The dashboard shows the distribution of events by DNS record type and highlights the most common MITRE ATT&CK tactics and techniques observed in detected threats. A table provides threat essential details including threat name, threat type, MITRE mappings, and threat reference links.

Use the controls to filter by DNS record type, tactic name, and technique name to prioritize investigation of malicious domains and intrusion attempts.

[**Integrations Page**](/app/integrations/detail/cato_networks/overview)

attributes.title: [Logs Cato Networks] Threat & DNS
